min_genes.guidance: Minimum number of genes expressed per cell. 200 is standard for most tissues.

max_genes.guidance: Maximum genes per cell. Cells above this are likely doublets. Adjust based on the distribution — use the inflection point.

max_pct_mito.guidance: Maximum percentage mitochondrial reads. Tissue-dependent: 5% for clean PBMCs, 10-15% for solid tissues, up to 20% for heart or kidney. Always inspect the distribution first.

min_counts.guidance: Minimum total UMI counts per cell. Optional — min_genes usually suffices.

validation.check: At least 50% of cells retained. If more than 50% removed, thresholds may be too aggressive — inspect QC plots.
